name: vc-skills
description: VC investor persona simulators for Claude Code — pitch to AI VCs before you pitch for real.

plugins.name: sequoia
plugins.description: Sequoia Capital — Pattern-matching legendary operator who built category-defining companies

plugins.name: a16z
plugins.description: Andreessen Horowitz — Software-is-eating-the-world thesis with deep technical conviction

plugins.name: yc
plugins.description: Y Combinator — Make something people want — relentless focus on product-market fit

plugins.name: benchmark
plugins.description: Benchmark Capital — Equal-partnership model with contrarian board-level operator mentality

plugins.name: founders-fund
plugins.description: Founders Fund — Thielian definite optimism — back bold frontier-tech bets

plugins.name: accel
plugins.description: Accel — Early mover in SaaS and global expansion with prepared-mind investing

plugins.name: lightspeed
plugins.description: Lightspeed Venture Partners — Multi-stage global investor with enterprise and consumer conviction

plugins.name: tiger-global
plugins.description: Tiger Global — Data-driven velocity investor scaling winners across public and private markets

plugins.name: bessemer
plugins.description: Bessemer Venture Partners — Cloud computing thesis pioneer with rigorous anti-portfolio honesty

plugins.name: greylock
plugins.description: Greylock Partners — Network-effects thesis investor building platforms that compound

plugins.name: kaszek
plugins.description: Kaszek Ventures — LatAm-native VC from MercadoLibre founders — operator-first, $3B+ AUM

plugins.name: softbank-latam
plugins.description: SoftBank Latin America — AI-first LatAm growth investor — big checks, category leaders, post-2022 discipline

plugins.name: operator-vc
plugins.description: Archetype — Former founder/exec who evaluates through operational lens

plugins.name: finance-vc
plugins.description: Archetype — Wall Street rigor applied to venture — unit economics and LTV/CAC obsessed

plugins.name: product-vc
plugins.description: Archetype — Product intuition first — evaluates UX, retention loops, and user delight

plugins.name: network-vc
plugins.description: Archetype — Connector who evaluates deals through ecosystem and relationship leverage

plugins.name: thesis-vc
plugins.description: Archetype — Deep research investor with sector-specific conviction and published theses

plugins.name: impact-investor
plugins.description: Archetype — Dual mandate — market-rate returns AND measurable social/environmental impact

plugins.name: pre-seed-angel
plugins.description: Stage — Earliest conviction bet — evaluates founder, not traction

plugins.name: seed-investor
plugins.description: Stage — First institutional check — product signals and initial PMF indicators

plugins.name: series-a-partner
plugins.description: Stage — Institutional scaling — repeatable GTM, unit economics, team build-out

plugins.name: growth-investor
plugins.description: Stage — Category winners at scale — market leadership, margins, and path to IPO

plugins.name: silicon-valley-vc
plugins.description: Region — Bay Area default — global ambition, network density, and blitzscaling bias

plugins.name: latam-vc
plugins.description: Region — Latin America specialist — local execution, FX risk, and leapfrog opportunities

plugins.name: european-vc
plugins.description: Region — European deep-tech and regulation-forward investing with capital efficiency

plugins.name: paradigm
plugins.description: Paradigm — Research-driven crypto VC — infrastructure over apps, working sessions over pitches

plugins.name: a16z-crypto
plugins.description: a16z Crypto — Read-Write-Own thesis — DXR Framework, token design, full-stack platform support

plugins.name: benchmark-mode
plugins.description: Meta — Full VC readiness assessment — 10 dimensions, scores 0-100, matches you to VCs
